ns0:entry.ns0:title: AikidoSec/safe-chain
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AikidoSec/safe-chain
Language: javascript
Protect against malicious code installed via npm, yarn, pnpm, npx, pnpx, pip, uv and poetry with Aikido Safe Chain. Free to use, no tokens required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DavidHDev/react-bits
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DavidHDev/react-bits
Language: javascript
An open source collection of animated, interactive & fully customizable React components for building memorable websites.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TryGhost/Ghost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TryGhost/Ghost
Language: javascript
Independent technology for modern publishing, memberships, subscriptions and newsletters.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WhiskeySockets/Baileys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WhiskeySockets/Baileys
Language: javascript
Socket-based TS/JavaScript API for WhatsApp Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datawhalechina/easy-vibe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datawhalechina/easy-vibe
Language: javascript
💻 vibe coding 2026 | Your first modern Coding course for beginners to master step by step.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Unlimited FREE AI coding. Connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline, Copilot, Antigravity to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini via 40+ providers. Auto-fallback, RTK -40% tokens, never hit limits.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fishjar/kiss-translator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fishjar/kiss-translator
Language: javascript
A simple, open source bilingual translation extension & Greasemonkey script (一个简约、开源的 双语对照翻译扩展 & 油猴脚本)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gaotianliuyun/gao
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gaotianliuyun/gao
Language: javascript
FongMi影视和tvbox配置文件，如果喜欢，请Fork自用。使用前请仔细阅读仓库说明，一旦使用将被视为你已了解。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jackwener/OpenCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jackwener/OpenCLI
Language: javascript
Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: liyupi/ai-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/liyupi/ai-guide
Language: javascript
程序员鱼皮的 AI 资源大全 + Vibe Coding 零基础教程，分享 OpenClaw 保姆级教程、大模型玩法（DeepSeek / GPT / Gemini / Claude）、最新 AI 资讯、Prompt 提示词大全、AI 知识百科（Agent Skills / RAG / MCP / A2A）、AI 编程教程（Harness Engineering）、AI 工具用法（Cursor / Claude Code / TRAE / Codex / Copilot）、AI 开发框架教程（Spring AI / LangChain）、AI 产品变现指南，帮你快速掌握 AI 技术，走在时代前沿。本项目为开源文档，已升级为鱼皮 AI 导航网站

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle/skills
Language: javascript
Oracle DB Skills is a curated library of 100+ practical, documentation-backed guides for working with Oracle Database, organized by domain

ns0:entry.ns0:title: poloclub/transformer-explainer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/poloclub/transformer-explainer
Language: javascript
Transformer Explained Visually: Learn How LLM Transformer Models Work with Interactive Visualization

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usebruno/bruno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usebruno/bruno
Language: javascript
Opensource IDE For Exploring and Testing API's (lightweight alternative to Postman/Insomnia)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarazhangrui/follow-builders
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarazhangrui/follow-builders
Language: javascript
AI builders digest — monitors top AI builders on X and YouTube podcasts, remixes their content into digestible summaries. Follow builders, not influencers.
